name: write_chunks
doc:
Write stdin chunks to a file, one line at a time.
Each iteration: read a line from stdin, write it as a chunk to the file.
Exits on EOF (Ctrl+D).

name: read_chunks
doc:
Read a file line by line, one chunk at a time.
Each iteration: read the next line chunk, echo it to console.
Exits when file is fully consumed.

next:
Demonstrates style stdio transport.

  Reads one message from stdin using the two console input verbs:
    inputs console() String              — readline (headers)
    inputs console(count Integer) Bytes  — readexactly (body)

  Expected stdin format:
    Content-Length: <n>\r\n
    \r\n
    <n bytes of JSON body>

  Run with piped input:
    printf "Content-Length: 15\r\n\r\n{\"method\":\"init\"}" | ./build/stdio_demo

name: read_message
doc:
Read one framed message from stdin.
Parses the Content-Length header, skips the blank separator line,
then reads exactly that many bytes from stdin.

Exits when called with Exit or on process termination.
